behaviors.description: The speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels so that the summary can attribute statements to specific attendees.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real speech-to-text model diarization output (AI/ML content), which stubs can mask. Rejected Workflow because the behavior text targets STT label fidelity itself, not a required multi-agentic sequence assertion.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real meeting audio sample through the production STT API with diarization enabled, then assert speaker tags are present and consistently attached to utterances that map to known attendees.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into the summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: This is deterministic parsing/structuring logic at a local code boundary; real infra or model calls are not required to expose failures in extraction rules.
behaviors.test_description: Provide transcript text fixtures with explicit assignment phrasings and assert the parser returns normalized task objects containing both assignee and task text fields.

behaviors.description: The live summary output contains at least one action item for every attendee who was assigned a task during the meeting.
behaviors.justification: The pass/fail condition depends on real LLM content decisions about coverage and attribution; mocked outputs can trivially satisfy the rule and hide misses. Rejected Workflow because the behavior text is a single summary-output quality requirement, not explicitly a multi-agentic chain contract.
behaviors.test_description: Send a transcript with known assigned attendees to the real summarization model and assert each assigned attendee appears in at least one generated action item.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into the `decisions` section schema rather than generic narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: Behavior is about deterministic routing after decisions are already identified; failure is in local mapping logic, not infra/model interaction.
behaviors.test_description: Feed pre-identified decision objects into the routing function and assert they populate only the `decisions` schema field and never narrative buckets.

behaviors.description: Key decisions mentioned in the transcript appear in the live summary's `decisions` section, not buried in the narrative.
behaviors.justification: This validates real model extraction/placement quality from transcript content, which deterministic fixtures cannot prove. Rejected Workflow because the behavior text centers on one summary-output quality check rather than end-to-end multi-step agentic orchestration.
behaviors.test_description: Pass transcripts containing explicit decision statements to the real summarizer and assert those decisions are present in the generated `decisions` section and absent from narrative-only placement.

behaviors.description: When the audio file is longer than 60 minutes, the service splits it into segments and processes them sequentially, merging the results into a single coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: This behavior is explicitly a sequenced multi-step pipeline (segment -> process per segment -> merge) with agentic summarization quality in the merged result, so single-step Agentic or Integration would miss cross-step failures.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real >60-minute recording through production flow, verify segment boundaries and ordered processing across segments, then validate merged output is one structured summary with cross-segment continuity (no dropped or duplicated sections).

behaviors.description: The full pipeline (upload audio, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes without manual intervention for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: This is an end-to-end requirement spanning multiple stages including real AI calls and handoffs; only a full workflow test can catch orchestration and cross-stage failure modes.
behaviors.test_description: Execute a production-like run with a real meeting file from upload through delivery, asserting automatic completion, valid structured payload shape, and no manual retries or operator actions.
